name: Rampart Knight
flavor_text: Where others charge forward, the Rampart Knight stands immovable, a wall of iron between the living and oblivion.

name: Blade of Empires
flavor_text: Where East meets West in iron and blood, this warrior carries the weight of conquered thrones upon their sword arm.

name: Menuki Bladedancer
flavor_text: Where others grip steel, they wield the sacred ornament itself, their fists becoming legend with every strike.

name: Khyber Shadow Dancer
flavor_text: Where the Macedonian conqueror's blade met the mountain passes, a new breed of silent death was forged.

name: Dueling Pistoleer
flavor_text: Where blade once settled honor, powder and ball now speak. Swift hands decide who walks away from fate's crossroads.

name: Siege Warden
flavor_text: Where walls stand defiant, the Siege Warden answers with thunder, breaking stone and pride with equal measure.

name: Ironbolt Warden
flavor_text: Bearer of the baron's crossbow, they walk the old hunting grounds where mortal skill alone defies fate.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: Large Crossbow (Ganze Rüstung) of Johann Georg, Baron von Rechenberg

main_weapon.name: Large Crossbow (Ganze Rüstung) of Johann Georg, Baron von Rechenberg

name: Sadamune Bladedancer
flavor_text: Bearer of the legendary smith's edge, whose swift steel moves like wind across autumn reeds.

name: Sunstone Spearthrower
flavor_text: Heir to Moctezuma's burning will, they hurl the sun's wrath across battlefields, where stone and flame are one.

name: Paladin of Durandal
flavor_text: Bearer of the unbreakable blade, Roland's valor echoes through Roncevaux, where legends are forged in blood and glory.

name: Iron Bolt Warden
flavor_text: Where ancient hunting instincts meet cold iron discipline, the Warden's relentless volleys silence even the mightiest of beasts.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: Original box for Centrefire automatic light machine gun

main_weapon.name: Original box for Centrefire automatic light machine gun

name: Thornwick Saboteur
flavor_text: Where others wield steel, they sow chaos—coaxing nature's cruelest edges into instruments of swift, silent ruin.

name: Ember Arithmetician
flavor_text: Where ancient fire meets iron calculation, the scholar's rule measures both distance and destruction with cold precision.

name: Ashen Geomancer
flavor_text: Where scholars see dust and ruin, the Ashen Geomancer reads the bones of creation itself.

name: Iron Bell Monk
flavor_text: Where sacred bronze rings, demons flee. The monk's mace strikes with the thunder of heaven's own proclamation.

name: Ember Academician
flavor_text: Where ink meets flame, the scholar-mage conjures fire from forgotten manuscripts, burning truth into the bones of the world.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: French Academician’s Habit of Julian Green and René de Obaldia

main_weapon.name: French Academician’s Habit of Julian Green and René de Obaldia

name: Ember Cartographer
flavor_text: Where others see wilderness, they chart dominion — each measured degree a fuse, each boundary line a burning truth.

name: Menuki Phantom
flavor_text: Through sharpened mind, the ornament awakens—what adorns the blade becomes the blade itself, striking unseen.

name: Twilight Rod Sage
flavor_text: Where intellect bends shadow into form, the Sage strikes with grace that no eye can follow nor mind anticipate.

name: Solar Sovereign
flavor_text: Bearing the Sun King's radiant standard, they command the battlefield through divine authority and the sacred right of kings.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: Banner of Louis XIV, King of France (r. 1643–1715)

main_weapon.name: Banner of Louis XIV, King of France (r. 1643–1715)

name: Stone Covenant Warden
flavor_text: Bound to the bones of the earth, these wise keepers channel ancient continental power through consecrated iron and stone.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: Mace Made for Henry II of France

main_weapon.name: Mace Made for Henry II of France

name: Galeborn Standard Bearer
flavor_text: Where the banner flies, the tempest follows. Ancient winds obey those who carry the sacred shaft of sky.

name: Crimson Leaf Binder
flavor_text: Where autumn falls, the sage wrestler reads the body's truth, subduing foes with wakizashi and ancient knowing hands.

generation_params.substrate_canonical_name: 紅葉蒔絵鞘脇指拵 Mounting for a Short Sword (Wakizashi)

main_weapon.name: 紅葉蒔絵鞘脇指拵 Mounting for a Short Sword (Wakizashi)

name: Tempest Banner Bearer
flavor_text: Where the sacred hata unfurls, heaven's breath obeys, bending storm and sky to ancient, wordless wisdom.

name: Shadowbane Standard-Bearer
flavor_text: Blessed by the dragon-slayer's covenant, they plant their banner where darkness yields and shadows kneel.

name: Moctezuma's Jade Warlord
flavor_text: Bearer of the obsidian macuahuitl, Moctezuma's chosen champion crushes enemies beneath the war-god's unyielding, stone-edged wrath.

name: Blade of Castile
flavor_text: Where El Cid's Colada sang, kingdoms trembled. Carry that legacy forward, and let your steel write history.

name: Menuki Bladedancer
flavor_text: Where others grip steel, they wield the sacred ornament itself, their fists becoming legend with every strike.

name: Phantom Blade Inheritor
flavor_text: Bearer of Sadamune's cursed edge, they move between shadows and steel, their strikes swift as falling autumn leaves.

name: Dusk Pistoleer
flavor_text: Where ancient huntsmen once drew bow, this wanderer draws cold iron, sealing fate with a whispered trigger's kiss.

name: Iron Shilpi Veer
flavor_text: Forged in Wayland's sacred fire, this warrior carries thunder itself, where ancient craft meets the dharma of devastation.

name: Far-Striking Warden
flavor_text: From distant hills they deliver fate's verdict, unseen as the Norns who cut the thread of life.

main_weapon.name: Blaser R93 Tactical German 7.62mm Sniper Rifle

name: Corsair Blade
flavor_text: Where sea meets steel, these swift raiders dance between death and glory, their cutlasses singing ancient songs of plunder.

name: Ember Scholiast
flavor_text: Through ancient manuscripts, they transmute written word into living flame, wielding knowledge itself as the forge of destruction.

name: Ironblood Warlord
flavor_text: Where great swords clash against stone and bone, the Ironblood Warlord stands unbroken, forged by conquest and ancient fury.
